manual_entries.title: ABB A7C1 Fieldbus Adapter A Communication Warning
manual_entries.summary: Cyclic communication between the drive and fieldbus adapter A, or between PLC and the adapter, is lost.

zh.title: ABB A7C1 现场总线适配器 A 通讯警告
zh.summary: 传动与现场总线适配器 A 之间，或 PLC 与该适配器之间的循环通讯信号已经丢失。

structured_payload.fault_name: 现场总线适配器 A 通讯
recommended_actions: 检查现场总线通讯状态
检查 50 至 53 组参数设置
检查电缆连接以及主站通讯状态
Check cable connections and bus master communication

chunk.cleaned_text: A7C1 fieldbus adapter A communication lost; check fieldbus status, fieldbus parameters, cable connections, and bus master communication.

evidence.evidence_text: A7C1 现场总线适配器A通讯 传动与总线适配器模块A之间，或PLC和总线适配器模块A之间的循环通讯信号丢失。

manual_entries.title: ABB D50C Maximum Flow Protection
manual_entries.summary: Measured flow exceeds the defined warning threshold in pump and flow applications.

zh.title: ABB D50C 最大流量保护
zh.summary: 在泵和流量应用中，实测流量超过了定义的警告阈值。

recommended_actions: 检查系统是否存在泄漏
检查参数 80.15、80.17 和 80.19 中的最大流量保护设置
Check maximum flow protection settings in parameters 80.15, 80.17, and 80.19

chunk.cleaned_text: D50C maximum flow protection; measured flow exceeds defined warning level; check leakage and flow protection settings.

evidence.evidence_text: D50C 最大流量保护 实际流量超过定义的警告液位。 检查系统是否有泄漏。

manual_entries.title: Siemens F07011 Motor Overtemperature Fault
manual_entries.summary: The drive trips on motor overtemperature when the measured or modeled motor temperature exceeds the configured fault threshold.

zh.title: Siemens F07011 电机过温故障
zh.summary: 当测得或模型计算的电机温度超过设定故障阈值时，变频器会因电机过温而跳闸。

recommended_actions: 检查电机温度阈值参数 p0604 和 p0605
检查传感器接线和电机实际温度工况
Check motor temperature threshold parameters p0604 and p0605
Check sensor wiring and motor temperature conditions

chunk.cleaned_text: F07011 motor overtemperature fault; the drive faults when motor temperature exceeds p0605 or exceeds p0604 with response configured.

evidence.evidence_text: 过热故障 (F07011): 发生以下情况，变频器作出故障响应： 电机温度 > p0605。

manual_entries.title: Siemens A01098 RTC Date and Time Required
manual_entries.summary: The real-time clock date and time are no longer valid after long power interruption and must be set again.

zh.title: Siemens A01098 RTC 需要重新设置日期和时间
zh.summary: 长时间断电后，实时时钟的日期和时间不再有效，必须重新设置。

structured_payload.fault_name: RTC 需要设置日期和时间
recommended_actions: 重新设置实时时钟日期和时间
检查参数 p8405 以确认该警告是否应启用
Set the real-time clock date and time
Check parameter p8405 if the warning should be active

chunk.cleaned_text: A01098 RTC date and time required; after long power interruption the clock is no longer valid and must be set again.
chunk.text_excerpt: A01098 RTC date and time required

evidence.evidence_text: A01098 RTC：需要设置日期和时间 控制单元的电源长时间中断。实时时钟显示的日期和时间不再有效。
